messages.content:
Hey! 

I Hope you've been well! 

My names Tanasie Dragich. (Stage name NASI) and I'm interested in playing a gig at your venue. I'm reaching out to inquire about hire cost, specs of the space, labour cost (if in house) and the potential to hop on another bands gig if they are looking for an extra support.Â  

I make indie punk rock songs with raw emotional lyrics. I perform either with just my guitars and vocals or using STEMS/backing tracks for the full band sound. I will attach my EPK below for your reference.Â  

I have a song coming out on the 4th of June which you can hear in advance on my EPK called, "Destruction & Debris". I am also looking to release more this year up to a total of 8 songs which I would like to ideally have a gig to promote each release.Â  

Thank you for your time and consideration. Looking forward to hearing from/working with you. 

Best Regards
Tanasie Dragich 

EPK:Â https://nasi.bandzoogle.com/home
Ph: +61405146795
